name: semi-dark hole by the root chamber
description: I'm in a semi-dark hole by the root chamber
hints: There is a locked door here blocking your way. You need something to unlock it.
The skeleton keys from the treetop (room 2) will unlock this door.
UNLOCK DOOR with the skeleton keys in your inventory. Then OPEN DOOR to proceed to the long hallway beyond.
notes: A locked door blocks progress deeper underground. Requires the skeleton keys from the treetop (room 2) to unlock. Once unlocked, leads to the long hallway (room 6) and eventually the large cavern system.
